visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A male creator wearing a white cap and a peach-colored utility shirt and shorts stands in a bright subway station corridor. He holds a smartphone in one hand and two Pokémon plush toys in the other. A female creator in a grey T-shirt and olive-green cargo pants stands behind him, clapping her hands and smiling. The background features colorful anime-style posters on a long wall. (2) The camera pans to a massive wall display covered in thousands of small Pokémon cards and stickers arranged in a precise grid pattern. Large graphic posters of Lucario and Gardevoir are visible above the card display. Metro station signage with arrows and text in Chinese is visible overhead. (3) A close-up shot shows the male's hands holding three small rectangular stickers featuring Pikachu, Lucario, and Gardevoir. The man then stands in front of the card wall, pointing to a specific sticker and peeling it off with his fingers. He exhibits a wide-mouthed, surprised facial expression and performs a celebratory dance movement. (4) The duo moves in front of a large digital advertising screen displaying 'Pokémon' logos and card pack graphics. The male creator gestures enthusiastically toward the screen, then walks toward the camera, pointing directly into the lens while maintaining a high-energy smile and nodding.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 8月8號父親節的. [Slogan]: 08.08 6:00. (2) [Subtitle]: 一早6點. [Subtitle]: 早上6點. [Subtitle]: 我們在幹什麼東西. [Variety]: 父親節快樂~. (3) [Subtitle]: 沒有人care父親節. [Subtitle]: 沒有人care我們兩個. [Subtitle]: 辛苦的父親. [Subtitle]: 一早就來這邊. [Subtitle]: 幫我的兒子. [Subtitle]: 找我們的偶像. [Logo]: 中山捷運站紅線. [Logo]: 中山捷運站紅線檢票口. (4) [Logo]: 寶可夢卡牌最新系列. [Logo]: ///超級進化///. [Slogan]: 「超級交響樂」. [Slogan]: 「超級勇氣」. [Slogan]: 8月15日(五)發售!. (5) [Subtitle]: 超級進化帥炸了欸. [Subtitle]: 你看這寶可夢的卡牌. [Subtitle]: 這不是廣告而已喔. [Subtitle]: 是貼紙喔. [Subtitle]: 真的可以撕喔. (6) [Slogan]: 一人限抽一張!. [Subtitle]: 但是一個人一張而已對不對. [Subtitle]: 一共有三款. [Subtitle]: 8月8號開始. [Subtitle]: 玩家們就可以過來這邊撕了. (7) [Subtitle]: 所以我帶你們三個來. [Subtitle]: 一人一張. [Subtitle]: 總共有三款. [Subtitle]: 看能不能蒐集到全部. [Subtitle]: 我第一個嗎!!. [Variety]: (第一抽的興奮). (8) [Subtitle]: 是誰是誰. [Subtitle]: 路卡利歐. [Variety]: (開心爆表). (9) [Subtitle]: 我兒子現在的偶像. [Subtitle]: 他現在最喜歡路卡利歐. [Subtitle]: 啊如果你沒辦法到現場. [Subtitle]: 也沒有關係啊. [Subtitle]: 來我們寶可夢卡牌擴充包. [Subtitle]: 超級勇氣還有超級交響樂. (10) [Slogan]: 08.15 全台正式發售!!. [Subtitle]: 8月15號就在全台正式發售. [Subtitle]: 就是你看到影片的當下. [Subtitle]: 馬上就可以買了. (11) [Subtitle]: 我們這一次的超級進化寶可夢EX. [Subtitle]: 對戰更加的激烈. [Subtitle]: 你有抽到什麼好卡. [Subtitle]: 底下跟嘎哥分享一下. [Subtitle]: 留言讓我聞香一下. (12) [Subtitle]: 買兩盒回去孝順一下兒子. [Subtitle]: 兒子開心爸爸才開心嘛. [Subtitle]: 買!!.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male main creator (Cai Aga), 1 female main creator (Er Bo).
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male: Peach-colored cargo shirt, matching shorts, white cap, white sneakers. Female: Grey short-sleeved T-shirt, olive-green cargo pants, yellow crossbody bag.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern metro station corridor with white tiled floors and walls. One section of the wall is heavily decorated with a massive grid of Pokémon card stickers and large anime character posters. Another section features large digital/printed advertising billboards for card games.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy male voice speaks rapidly in Mandarin with high pitch variability. The BGM is a bright, upbeat electronic pop track with a steady kick drum and synth leads. Subtle indoor room tone is present. (2) The male voice maintains high arousal, punctuated by faint laughter from a female voice. A crisp 'paper peeling' sound (incidental noise) occurs as a sticker is removed. A 'pop' SFX is added in post-production. (3) The speaker's volume increases to a shout when identifying the Pokémon 'Lucario.' Fast-paced speech continues with minimal pauses. The BGM remains energetic. (4) The audio transitions into a promotional delivery. The male voice uses a slightly more rhythmic, persuasive tone. Whoosh SFX accompany visual cuts between posters. The track ends with a final enthusiastic call to action.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Location Intro -> Feature Demonstration -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote the release of the new Pokémon Trading Card Game 'Super Evolution' expansion packs and a special interactive sticker wall event at the Zhongshan Metro Station in Taipei.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct demonstration of the card wall, unboxing-style sticker peeling, and clear mentions of the release date and product names.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-arousal vlog style typical of Taiwanese social media creators to drive foot traffic to a specific OOH (Out-of-Home) marketing installation.
